results.name: 1.1 Cookie banner appears on first visit
results.plain_english: A visitor who has never been to the site sees the cookie banner before any tracking begins.
results.evidence: Banner element present in the DOM.

results.name: 1.2 Zero requests to Google before consent
results.plain_english: The browser does not contact Google Analytics or Google Tag Manager until the visitor has said yes.

results.name: 1.3 Zero requests to Microsoft before consent
results.plain_english: The browser does not contact Microsoft Clarity until the visitor has said yes.

results.name: 1.4 Zero requests to bing.com before consent
results.plain_english: The Microsoft advertising ID sync (bing.com) does not fire until consent is granted.

results.name: 1.5 Zero analytics cookies set before consent
results.plain_english: No Google or Microsoft tracking cookies are dropped on the visitor's device before they choose.

results.name: 2.1 Decline is written to the visitor's browser
results.plain_english: When the visitor clicks Decline, the site records that decision so they are not asked again.

results.name: 2.2 Banner disappears after decline
results.plain_english: The banner does not linger or nag after the visitor has answered.

results.name: 2.3 Silence persists across navigation
results.plain_english: Moving to another page on the site does not restart tracking after a decline.

results.name: 2.4 Silence persists across reloads
results.plain_english: Refreshing the page does not restart tracking after a decline. The decision survives.

results.name: 2.5 Banner does not re-appear on reload
results.plain_english: The visitor is not re-prompted on every visit. Their decline is honoured.

results.name: 3.1 Google Analytics loads after consent
results.plain_english: Google Analytics begins working exactly when the visitor agrees, not before.

results.name: 3.2 Microsoft Clarity loads after consent
results.plain_english: Microsoft Clarity begins working exactly when the visitor agrees, not before.

results.name: 3.3 Google's identifying cookie is set (_ga)
results.plain_english: Once accepted, Google's standard analytics cookie is placed on the visitor's device.
results.evidence: Cookies now include: ANONCHK, CLID, MR, MUID, SM, SRM_B, _clck, _clsk, _ga, _ga_7F2PPZPXSK

results.name: 3.4 Microsoft's identifying cookies are set (_clck, _clsk)
results.plain_english: Once accepted, Microsoft Clarity's standard cookies are placed on the visitor's device.

results.name: 3.5 Consent persists across reload
results.plain_english: The visitor is not asked again. Their acceptance survives reloads and repeat visits.
results.evidence: After reload: Google added 2 more request(s), Clarity added 4.

results.name: 4.1 Google Analytics loads when only it is accepted
results.plain_english: Turning on only Google Analytics activates Google Analytics.

results.name: 4.2 Microsoft Clarity stays off when only Google is accepted
results.plain_english: Microsoft Clarity remains completely silent when the visitor did not accept it.

results.name: 4.3 bing.com stays untouched when only Google is accepted
results.plain_english: Microsoft's advertising ID sync (bing.com) does not fire when Clarity is declined.

results.name: 4.4 No Clarity cookies are set when only Google is accepted
results.plain_english: The visitor's device receives no Microsoft Clarity cookies (_clck, _clsk) if they said no to Clarity.

results.name: 4.5 No MUID cookie is set when only Google is accepted
results.plain_english: Microsoft's cross-site advertising identifier (MUID) is not set when Clarity is declined.

results.name: 5.1 Microsoft Clarity loads when only it is accepted
results.plain_english: Turning on only Microsoft Clarity activates Microsoft Clarity.

results.name: 5.2 Google Analytics stays off when only Clarity is accepted
results.plain_english: Google Analytics remains completely silent when the visitor did not accept it.

results.name: 5.3 No _ga cookie is set when only Clarity is accepted
results.plain_english: Google's standard analytics cookie is not placed on the visitor's device when they declined Google.

results.name: 6.0 (setup) Analytics cookies were successfully set after accept
results.plain_english: Confirming the accept step actually placed the cookies we are about to withdraw.

results.name: 6.1 Google's _ga cookie is cleared on withdrawal
results.plain_english: When the visitor changes their mind, the primary Google Analytics cookie is removed from their device.

results.name: 6.2 Google's session cookie is cleared on withdrawal
results.plain_english: The Google session identifier (_ga_G-7F2PPZPXSK) is removed on withdrawal.

results.name: 6.3 Microsoft Clarity's _clck cookie is cleared on withdrawal
results.plain_english: Microsoft Clarity's identifying cookie is removed from the visitor's device on withdrawal.

results.name: 6.4 Microsoft Clarity's _clsk cookie is cleared on withdrawal
results.plain_english: Microsoft Clarity's session cookie is removed from the visitor's device on withdrawal.

results.name: 6.5 Analytics providers stop firing after withdrawal
results.plain_english: After withdrawal (which reloads the page), no further calls to Google or Microsoft occur.

results.section: 7. Custom events stay silent before consent
results.name: 7.1 The 404 tracking event does not fire before consent
results.plain_english: When a visitor lands on a broken URL before choosing, no 'page not found' event is sent to Google.

results.section: 7. Custom events stay silent before consent
results.name: 7.2 The 'email intent' event does not fire before consent
results.plain_english: When a visitor clicks the email address in the Connect footer without first accepting, no email-click event is sent to Google.

results.section: 7. Custom events stay silent before consent
results.name: 7.3 The 'LinkedIn intent' event does not fire before consent
results.plain_english: When a visitor clicks a LinkedIn link without first accepting, no LinkedIn-click event is sent to Google.
